automation_intent: Automatizar la reconciliación de facturas: validar campos, cruzar con ERP, verificar cálculos, enrutar aprobaciones y registrar trazabilidad

selected_opportunities.title: Validar campos obligatorios al ingreso con rechazo automático e inmediato
Cruzar automáticamente con ERP y escalar proveedores desconocidos en tiempo real
Verificar automáticamente que líneas sumen el total con tolerancia de $0.01
Enrutar facturas >$10,000 automáticamente al nivel de aprobación correcto
Registrar trazabilidad completa de cada factura en log de auditoría inmutable

confirmed_pains.title: Facturas incompletas ingresan al flujo y se detectan tarde
Proveedores no registrados bloquean el flujo completo
Los errores de cálculo no se detectan hasta la revisión contable final
Las facturas de alto monto no tienen circuito de aprobación diferenciado
Sin trazabilidad de aprobaciones para auditoría

ideal_steps.name: Validate Invoice Fields
ideal_steps.description: Check that each invoice has ID, vendor RUT, total amount, line items, and date. Reject immediately if incomplete.

ideal_steps.name: Match Vendor Registry
ideal_steps.description: Cross-reference each invoice vendor against the ERP registry. Flag unknown vendors for immediate escalation.

ideal_steps.name: Verify Line Item Totals
ideal_steps.description: Sum all line items and verify they equal the invoice total within ±$0.01 tolerance. Reject if discrepancy exceeds tolerance.

ideal_steps.name: Route Approval Workflow
ideal_steps.description: Route each invoice to the correct approval tier: invoices >$10,000 to senior approvers, others to standard approvers.

ideal_steps.name: Record Audit Trail
ideal_steps.description: Write an immutable audit log entry for each processing event: receipt, validation, vendor check, balance check, routing decision.

business_rules.name: invoice-completeness-rule
business_rules.description: Every invoice must have ID, vendor ID, amount > 0, and at least one line item
business_rules.then: reject immediately if any required field is missing

business_rules.name: vendor-registry-rule
business_rules.description: Every vendor ID must exist in the approved ERP registry
business_rules.then: reject or escalate if vendor not found in registry

business_rules.name: balance-tolerance-rule
business_rules.description: Sum of line items must equal invoice total within ±$0.01 tolerance

business_rules.name: senior-approval-rule
business_rules.description: Invoices with total amount > $10,000 require senior management approval

business_rules.name: audit-trail-rule
business_rules.description: Every processing event must be recorded in the immutable audit log
business_rules.then: append event with timestamp, actor, and outcome to audit log

success_criteria: 100% of invoices validated at ingestion — zero incomplete invoices advance
All vendor IDs cross-referenced against ERP in <1s per invoice
Zero arithmetic errors reach accounting review
Senior approvals routed within 1 hour of receipt
Full audit trail available for any invoice within 30 seconds
edge_cases: Invoice with line items that sum correctly but individual amounts are negative
Vendor with multiple ERP registrations (duplicate IDs)
Invoice amount exactly equal to $10,000 — boundary approval routing
Batch of 50+ invoices from the same vendor arriving simultaneously
